svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 32px; margin-left: 13px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 464px; height: 1px; padding-top: 74px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Session Memory — In-process
Store: LangGraph AgentState (Python dict)
Lookup: direct field access
Lifetime: single workflow execution
Contents:
• Current conversation messages
• Identified customer & active order
• Intent, extracted slots, intermediate results

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 252px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #795548; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#795548, #b7988d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

div.div: on session end: flush recent facts

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 224, 178), rgb(66, 39, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 464px; height: 1px; padding-top: 299px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Short-term Memory — Redis (local container)
Store: Key-value with TTL (7 days)
Lookup: exact key — shared across processes
Contents:
• Recent conversation summaries
• Customer preferences (current week)
• Recent tool call outcomes

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(239, 108, 0), rgb(222, 110, 17));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 470px; margin-left: 252px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #795548; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#795548, #b7988d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(224, 247, 250), rgb(13, 33, 36)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 131, 143), rgb(58, 171, 181));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 464px; height: 1px; padding-top: 514px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Long-term Memory — Qdrant (local container)
Store: Vector embeddings — text-embedding-004 (Vertex AI), 768-dim cosine
Lookup: semantic similarity search at session start
Contents:
• Customer history & past issues
• Previous conversation outcomes
• Domain facts & long-term preferences

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(189, 189, 189), rgb(75, 75, 75));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 458px; height: 1px; padding-top: 720px; margin-left: 24px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Demo moment: On Alice's second visit, the Front Agent recalls
her prior cancellation from Long-term Memory and personalises the greeting.
